kirundi.toggle_studio_tour: Ugurura canke ugara uruzinduko rwa studio
kirundi.explore_15_interactive_tools_that_teac: Rondera ibikoresho 15 bigufasha kugira uruhare, vyigisha inyigisho z'amabara, ubuhanzi bw'imibare, igishushanyo c'iremwa, no kugerwako mu maso. Buri gafishi ni ikanvasi y'iremwa itandukanye. Dore ivyo ushobora kurema:
kirundi.explore_hsl_color_space_interactively: Rondera umwanya w'amabara HSL mu buryo bugufasha kugira uruhare
kirundi.mix_paints_with_subtractive_color_theo: Vanga amarangi ukoresheje inyigisho y'amabara yo gukuramo
kirundi.create_pixel_art_on_a_grid_canvas: Rema ubuhanzi bwa pixel ku ikanvasi ifite urusobe
kirundi.draw_with_rotational_reflective_symmet: Shushanya ukoresheje ubunganya bwo kuzenguruka n'ubw'indorerwamo
kirundi.flow_fields_particles_starfields_auror: Imirima y'igenda, uduce duto, umurima w'inyenyeri, aurora
kirundi.virtual_spin_painting_with_physics: Gusiga amarangi mu kuzunguruka kuri mudasobwa hakoreshejwe fiziki
kirundi.geometric_string_patterns_on_pegs: Ibishushanyo vy'umugozi vya jewometeri ku misumari
kirundi.repeating_tile_patterns_like_m_c_esche: Ibishushanyo vy'amakaro vyisubiramo nk'ivya M.C. Escher
kirundi.mandelbrot_julia_sets_sierpinski_trian: Mandelbrot, amatsinda ya Julia, mpandeshatu ya Sierpinski
kirundi.design_and_export_css_gradient_pattern: Shushanya kandi usohore ibishushanyo vya gradient vya CSS
kirundi.hidden_3d_images_magic_eye_style: Amashusho ya 3D ahishe (uburyo bwa Magic Eye)
kirundi.harmony_desc: Rondera ubwumvikane bw'umuziki, intera z'amajwi, n'isano iri hagati y'ijwi n'ishusho
kirundi.wcag_contrast_checker_for_accessibilit: Igenzura ry'itandukaniro rya WCAG ku kugerwako
kirundi.color_theory_additive_vs_subtractive_m: Inyigisho y'amabara (kuvanga vyongera na vyo gukuramo, amabara yuzuzanya, HSL/RGB), imirongo igoramye y'imibare (hypotrochoids, Lissajous), fractals no kwisusa, jewometeri y'amakaro, ukwumva kw'amaso muri Op Art, amahame yo kugerwako ya WCAG, n'ubuhanzi bwa mudasobwa. Buri gikoresho cigisha imibare iri inyuma y'ubwiza.
kirundi.hue_0_360_around_the_wheel_saturation_: Hue (0-360 hakurikijwe uruziga), saturation (isuku), urumuri. Ayuzuzanya arahanganye, ay'urumuri rumwe ari hafi, atatu ari ku ntera ya 120°. Newton yashyize amabara yose ku ruziga mu 1666.
kirundi.paint_and_print_subtractive_cmy_mixes_: Amarangi no gucapa = gukuramo (CMY iyavanze itanga umwijima); urumuri n'ecran = kongeramo (RGB iyavanze itanga umweru). Isi imwe, mugabo imibare itandukanye rwose — imashini icapa itekereza ku mbaho za K, televiziyo ikatekereza kuri Hz.
kirundi.pixel_art_bitmap_craft_at_8_8_to_32_32: Ubuhanzi bwa Pixel — umwuga wa bitmap kuva 8×8 kugeza 32×32
kirundi.each_pixel_is_a_deliberate_decision_ne: Buri pixel ni icemezo cafashwe ku bushake. Sprites za NES zizwiho gushyira intwari muri 16×16 hakoreshejwe amabara ane gusa. Algorithm y'umurongo ya Bresenham ishushanya imirongo iruhande nta mibare y'ibice.
kirundi.bilateral_mirror_rotational_n_fold_poi: Bw'impande zombi (indorerwamo), bwo kuzenguruka (incuro n), bw'akadomo. Amatsinda 17 y'ibishushanyo vy'urukuta agena buri gishushanyo ca 2D cisubiramo — umurimo wose wa Escher.
kirundi.a_small_circle_rolls_inside_a_big_one_: Uruziga ruto ruzengurukira mu runini, ikaramu ikaba iri kure y'ikigo. Igipimo c'imirongo yombi kigena umubare w'ibibabi; intera ikagena ubugari. Iki gikinisho cahawe uburenganzira mu 1965, mugabo imibare yaco ikomoka mu myaka ya 1700.
kirundi.sol_lewitt_wrote_instructions_the_wall: Sol LeWitt yanditse amabwiriza; uwakoze ku rukuta ni we washyize mu bikorwa. Uyu munsi: Processing, p5.js, Cinder. “Umuhanzi ni itegeko, si inyishu.”
kirundi.spin_art_centripetal_physics_in_paint: Ubuhanzi bwo Kuzunguruka — fiziki y'imbaraga zikurura ku kigo mu marangi
kirundi.drop_paint_spin_watch_it_fling_outward: Ta amarangi, zunguruka, uraba uko ajugunywa hanze mu buryo bw'umuzingi. Damien Hirst yinjije miriyoni acuruza amashusho yo kuzunguruka. Ni fiziki imwe n'iy'imashini yumutsa saladi; F = mω²r.
kirundi.string_art_curves_from_straight_lines: Ubuhanzi bw'Umugozi — imirongo igoramye ivuye ku mirongo igororotse
kirundi.connect_every_n_th_nail_an_envelope_cu: Huza buri musumari wa n; umurongo w'ibahasha uzagaragara. Mary Everest Boole yabimenyekanishije nk'imibare yo mu ishuri hafi y'umwaka wa 1900. Cardioid yakozwe n'imirongo igororotse iracashimisha.
kirundi.op_art_fooling_the_visual_system: Op Art — kuriganya sisitemu yo kuraba
kirundi.bridget_riley_s_moir_fields_vasarely_s: Imirima ya moiré ya Bridget Riley, urusobe rwa Vasarely. Utugingo tw'impera tw'ubwonko dutahura imigendere durenza urugero iyo itandukaniro rihinduka vuba — urupapuro rukagaragara nk'aho *runyeganyega*.
kirundi.every_periodic_2d_tiling_fits_one_of_1: Buri gishushanyo c'amakaro ca 2D cisubiramo kijya mu rimwe mu matsinda 17 y'ubunganya. Escher yabimenye ubwo yasuraga Alhambra mu 1936; hanyuma amara imyaka 30 arangiza urutonde rwose.
kirundi.mandelbrot_1975_cauliflower_coastlines: Mandelbrot 1975. Shufureri, inkombe z'inyanja, imitsi y'amaraso, inkuba, uduseke tw'umwuka mu bihaha — vyose ni fractal. “Ibicu si imipira, imisozi si za konu, kandi ibishishwa vy'ibiti ntivyoroshye.”
kirundi.css_gives_you_linear_radial_and_conic_: CSS iguha gradient y'umurongo, iy'uruziga, n'iya conic. Umukororomvya nyawo ufite amabara akomeza (nta mirongo itandukanye) — “amabara 7 y'umukororomvya” yari ugutoranya kwa Newton ku bw'impamvu z'umuziki.
kirundi.90s_magic_eye_craze_each_eye_sees_a_sl: Ubushake bukabije bwa Magic Eye bwo mu myaka ya 90. Buri jisho ribona ishusho yahindutse gato; nurambika canke ugatandukanya amaso yawe neza, ubwonko bwawe buzabihuza bikavyara ubwimbike. Hafi 5% vy'abantu ntibashobora rwose — si amakosa yabo.
kirundi.wcag_2_1_normal_text_4_5_1_large_3_1_w: WCAG 2.1: inyandiko isanzwe 4.5:1, inini 3:1. Impamvu itandukaniro rito ribabaza abasoma badashobora kuraba neza, n'ubwo wowe waba ushobora kurisoma. APCA (isimbura WCAG 3.0) ikoresha urumuri rw'uko ijisho rubona, si igipimo c'urumuri gusa.
kirundi.harmony_lab_hint: Gereranya intera z'amajwi yumvikana n'atumvikana, huza igipimo c'inshuro n'igishushanyo, kandi uhindure isano y'umuziki mu bwumvikane bw'amaso.
kirundi.repeats_a_pattern_around_a_central_poi: busubiramo igishushanyo hakurikijwe akadomo ko hagati. Muri
kirundi.starfish_5_fold_snowflakes_6_fold_and_: , inyenyeri yo mu nyanja (incuro 5), utuce tw'urubura (incuro 6), n'indabo bibigaragaza hose.
kirundi.tile_patterns_quilts_floor_mosaics: Ibishushanyo vy'amakaro, ibiringiti vyadoze, mozayike yo hasi.
kirundi.snowflakes_honeycombs_islamic_star_pat: Utuce tw'urubura, ibivumu vy'inzuki, ibishushanyo vy'inyenyeri vya Isilamu.
kirundi.mandala_art_rose_windows_in_cathedrals: Ubuhanzi bwa mandala, amadirishya y'amaroza mu makatedarali.
kirundi.islamic_geometric_art_uses_radial_symm: Ubuhanzi bwa jewometeri bwa Isilamu bukoresha cane ubunganya bw'uruziga. Imipfundikizo ya Celtic, imyenda ya Navajo, n'ibimenyetso vy'imiryango y'Abayapani (“mon”) vyose bishingiye ku bunganya bwo kuzenguruka.
kirundi.uses_bilateral_reflection_symmetry_the: bukoresha ubunganya bw'impande zombi (bw'indorerwamo) — ubwoko buboneka mu maso y'abantu, mu binyugunyugu, no mu mababi. Ni bwo bunganya bukunze kuboneka cane mu isi y'inyamaswa.
kirundi.cycles_through_the_color_spectrum_as_y: inyura mu mabara yose mu gihe ushushanya, ikavyara ingaruka za mandala zisa na gradient mu buryo bwikora.
kirundi.the_quick_brown_fox_jumps_over_the_laz: Imbwebwe y'umukara yihuta isimbuka hejuru y'imbwa y'umunebwe
kirundi.sculpt_canvas: Igaragaza ry'igishusho ca 3D. Kurura kugira ngo uzenguruke.
kirundi.maximum_contrast_pop_art_brand_accents: Itandukaniro rikomeye cane. Pop art, ibimenyetso vy'amasosiyete.
kirundi.vibrant_but_balanced_childrens_books_c: Akeye mugabo aringaniye. Ibitabo vy'abana, ibitaramo vy'ibishushanyo.
kirundi.rich_palette_with_two_opposing_pairs: Amabara menshi afite amakipe abiri ahanganye.
kirundi.adjust_base_hue_saturation_lightness_v: Hindura hue fatizo, saturation, itandukaniro ry'urumuri, kuzenguruka, n'ingano y'amabara. Igikoresho kigaragaza amabara yumvikana ako kanya kandi kikayashyira mu bwoko bumwe mu bwumvikane 5 butandukanye. Nta manota, nta nyishu kigaragazwa — komeza uhindure kandi witegereze ni ibihe bivange bitanga ubuhe bwumvikane.
kirundi.hypothesis_free_text_no_right_answer_w: Iciyumviro (inyandiko yigenga — nta nyishu nyaco): Ni iki gituma amabara agaragara nk'ayumvikana aho kuba ateye urujijo?
kirundi.find_the_smallest_palette_that_still_f: Rondera amabara make cane mugabo akiguhaza nk'"yuzuye".
kirundi.real_impressionists_used_analogous_pal: Abahanzi nyakuri ba impressionnisme bakoreshaga amabara ahwanye. Ni iki gishobora kuba impamvu?
kirundi.some_color_schemes_have_proper_names_c: Bimwe mu bikoresho vy'amabara bifite amazina yavyo (ayuzuzanya, ayuzuzanya acikamo, atatu). Rondera ayo maze ugerageze kuyongera gukora.
kirundi.high_saturation_many_colors_busy_try_d: Saturation nyinshi + amabara menshi = urujijo. Gerageza kugabanya saturation ukoresheje agatambitse ko kuvanga — ni iki kibaho ku "bwumvikane"?
kirundi.i_think_i_understand_color_harmony_now: Ndiyumvira ko ubu numvise ubwumvikane bw'amabara — reka mbisobanure mu magambo yanjye
kirundi.explain_in_your_own_words_how_do_hue_s: Sobanura mu magambo yawe: ni gute intera ya hue, saturation, n'ingano y'amabara bigena "ubwumvikane"?
kirundi.design_note_discrete_5_state_harmony_m: Icitonderwa c'igishushanyo: ikimenyetso c'ubwumvikane gifite imiterere 5 itandukanye; uruziga rwa SVG rugaragaza aho amabara ari; nta manota ya "amabara meza" — vyakozwe bityo ku bushake.
kirundi.the_path_traced_by_a_point_on_a_small_: — inzira ikurikizwa n'akadomo kari ku ruziga ruto ruzengurukira mu runini. Igishushanyo giterwa n'
kirundi.greatest_common_divisor_of_the_two_rad: (umugabanyi rusange munini) w'imirongo yombi. Iyo R/r ari igice coroshye, ubona ibibabi bike; ibipimo bigoye bitanga inzira zizunguruka zitigera zisubirwamo.
kirundi.click_or_drag_on_the_canvas_to_create_: 👆 Fyonda canke ukurure ku ikanvasi kugira ngo ukore ibiturika vy'uduce duto
kirundi.click_and_drag_to_drip_paint_on_the_sp: 👆 Fyonda kandi ukurure kugira ngo utonyange amarangi ku ikanvasi izunguruka
kirundi.in_a_spinning_reference_frame_objects_: Mu ikadiri izunguruka, ibintu vyumva imbaraga z'ibinyoma zibisunikira hanze zihuye n'intera bifite uvuye ku kigo n'ikizigira c'umuvuduko w'inguni (ω²r).
kirundi.real_spin_art_uses_centripetal_acceler: Ubuhanzi nyabwo bwo kuzunguruka bukoresha kwiyongera k'umuvuduko werekeza ku kigo kugira ngo bukwize amarangi. Amarangi yoroheje aguruka hanze vuba; ay'ubugari akora ibimenyetso bigufi kandi bicungwa neza.
kirundi.the_combination_of_rotational_motion_a: Guhuza igenda ryo kuzenguruka n'ubugari bw'amarangi bitanga imizingi ya kamere n'ibishushanyo vyo guhuriranamo. Nta mashusho abiri yo kuzunguruka yigeze asa — ni ubwoko bwa
kirundi.from_straight_lines_with_a_circle_and_: ivuye ku mirongo igororotse. Ukoresheje uruziga n'ikuba rya 2, ubona
kirundi.the_heart_shaped_curve_seen_in_coffee_: — umurongo ugoramye ufite ishusho y'umutima ugaragara mu bikombe vy'ikawa. Ikuba rya 3 na ryo ritanga
kirundi.higher_multipliers_create_intricate_pa: . Amakuba menshi atanga ibishushanyo bigoye biyoborwa n'
kirundi.nail_n_connects_to_nail_n_m_mod_total: : umusumari N uhuzwa n'umusumari (N × M) mod umubare wose.
kirundi.optical_art_emerged_in_the_1960s_pione: (Ubuhanzi bw'Amaso) bwavutse mu myaka ya 1960, ababutangije ni
kirundi.it_exploits_the_mechanics_of_human_vis: . Bukoresha uko kuraba kw'umuntu bikora kugira ngo butange uburiganya bw'igenda, bwo kunyeganyega, n'ubwimbike ku buso buringaniye.
kirundi.appear_when_two_regular_grids_overlap_: bigaragara iyo urusobe rubiri rusanzwe rwuzuranaho ku nguni nto. Ubwonko bwawe ntibushobora gukemura ibishushanyo bihanganye, bityo bugatanga imirongo n'imiraba y'ibinyoma. Iyi ngaruka ni yo itera kurabagirana kw'“urugi rw'urusenge” ku myenda imwe n'imwe.
kirundi.occur_when_highly_saturated_complement: abaho iyo amabara yuzuzanya afite saturation nyinshi ashyizwe ku ruhande rumwe. Utugingo twa kuraba amabara mu jisho ryawe turahatana, bigatanga impera ivuza kandi idahagaze neza — ibi vyitwa
kirundi.in_the_retina_are_the_main_perceptual_: muri retina ni zo nzira nyamukuru zo kumva. Ibishushanyo vy'impeta zikikije ikigo kimwe bitera amaso gusimbuka atabishaka, bigatuma ubuhanzi bugaragara nk'aho buhumeka kandi butera.
kirundi.or_tiling_covers_a_plane_with_shapes_t: (canke gushyira amakaro) gutwikira ubuso hakoreshejwe amashusho ahuye nta myanya canke kwuzuranaho. Ni amashusho asanzwe atatu gusa ashobora gutwikira ubuso ari yonyine:
kirundi.1898_1972_transformed_simple_tilings_i: (1898–1972) yahinduye amakaro yoroshye abugira ubuhanzi agoreka impera z'amakaro. Uburyo bwe: goreka uruhande rumwe rw'ishusho hanyuma ukoporore uko kugoreka ku ruhande ruhanganye, kugira ngo amakaro akomeze guhuza neza. Iri ni ryo shingiro rya
kirundi.uses_tessellations_extensively_combini: bukoresha cane amakaro — buhuza inyenyeri, mpandatandatu, n'ibishushanyo vyuzuranye bigaragara mu misigiti nka Alhambra. Ibi bishushanyo bikurikiza amategeko akomeye y'imibare mu gihe bitanga urujijo rw'amaso rutangaje.
kirundi.flip_every_tessellation_can_be_classif: (guhindura uruhande). Buri gishushanyo c'amakaro gishobora gushyirwa mu ciciro hakurikijwe iryo kijyamo mu 'matsinda 17 y'ibishushanyo vy'urukuta'.
kirundi.click_tiles_to_cycle_their_colors: 👆 Fyonda amakaro kugira ngo uhindure amabara yayo
kirundi.is_generated_by_iterating_z_z_c_for_ev: ritangwa no gusubiramo z = z² + c kuri buri kadomo c mu buso bw'imibare igoye. Ududomo aho |z| iguma mu mipaka (itarenza 2) turi 'imbere' mu itsinda. Umupaka waryo ugaragaza
kirundi.use_the_same_formula_but_fix_c_and_var: akoresha formule imwe mugabo akomeza c kandi agahindura z y'intangiriro. Buri kadomo ka Mandelbrot gatanga itsinda rya Julia ryihariye — ududomo turi imbere muri Mandelbrot dutanga Julia zihujwe; udutuye hanze dutanga 'amatsinda ya Fatou' asa n'umukungugu.
kirundi.fractal_modifies_the_iteration_to_z_re: ihindura isubiramo rikaba z = (|Re(z)| + i|Im(z)|)² + c, bigatanga ishusho itaringaniye isa n'ubwato buriho umuriro. Yavumbuwe na Michael Michelitsch na Otto Rössler mu 1992.
kirundi.is_built_by_the_chaos_game_pick_a_rand: yubakwa n'"umukino w'akajagari": toranya akadomo utabigambiriye, hanyuma usimbuke kugera hagati y'inzira werekeza ku mpande yatoranyijwe utabigambiriye, ubisubiremo kenshi. Biratangaje, iyi nzira y'amahirwe itanga fractal yisusa neza rwose.
kirundi.1924_2010_coined_the_word_fractal_from: (1924–2010) yahimvye ijambo 'fractal' rikomoka ku Kilatini 'fractus' (cavunitse). Yerekanye ko inkombe z'inyanja, imisozi, imitsi y'amaraso, n'amasoko y'imigabane vyose bigaragaza jewometeri ya fractal —
kirundi.double_click_to_zoom_in_scroll_wheel_t: 👆 Fyonda kabiri kugira ngo wegereze • Uruziga rwo kuzamura kugira ngo wegereze canke utandukanye
kirundi.each_pixel_blends_red_green_and_blue_l: . Buri pixel ivanga urumuri rutukura, urw'icatsi, n'urw'ubururu ku rugero rutandukanye. Gradient ihindura izo ndangagaciro buhoro buhoro mu mwanya.
kirundi.produces_more_perceptually_uniform_gra: itanga gradient zingana neza mu maso kurusha RGB. Kuva ku rutukura kugera ku bururu muri RGB binyura mu ibara ry'ivu rihumye; muri HSL, binyura mu mabara y'umuyugubwe akeye — nk'uko umuhanzi yavangaga.
kirundi.are_everywhere_sunsets_rayleigh_scatte: ziri hose: izuba rirenga (gutatana kwa Rayleigh gutandukanya uburebure bw'imiraba y'urumuri), umukororomvya (kugoreka urumuri bikarutondeka hakurikijwe inshuro), n'ubwimbike bw'inyanja (amazi anywa urutukura mbere, hagasigara ubururu bwimbitse).
kirundi.sweep_color_around_a_center_point_like: zizengurutsa ibara hakurikijwe akadomo ko hagati nk'uruziga rw'amabara. Zikoreshwa mu bishushanyo vy'uruziga, mu bimenyetso vyo gupakira, no mu kwerekana amakuru. CSS yongeyeho ubufasha bwa conic-gradient mu 2020 gusa!
kirundi.use_gradients_to_create_depth_direct_a: bakoresha gradient kugira ngo batange ubwimbike, bayobore ubwenge, kandi bakangure amarangamutima. Gradient iva ku bishyushye ijya ku bikonje yerekana ubwimbike (kuraba kw'ikirere); iva ku rumuri ijya ku mwijima yerekana ubunini (chiaroscuro).
kirundi.describe_an_object_for_a_depth_map_or_: Sobanura ikintu ku ikarita y'ubwimbike canke ubuso ku gishushanyo...
kirundi.white_pops_out_gray_middle_black_far: Umweru = kuza imbere • Ivu = hagati • Umukara = kure
kirundi.your_eyes_are_6_cm_apart: Amaso yawe ari ku ntera ya cm 6
kirundi.so_each_sees_the_world_from_a_slightly: , bityo buri jisho ribona isi ku nguni itandukanye gato. Ubwonko bwawe buhuza ivyo bibona vyombi kugira ngo bumve
kirundi.magic_eye_images_hide_3d_shapes_in_a_r: (amashusho ya Magic Eye™) ahisha amashusho ya 3D mu gishushanyo cisubiramo. Ubwenge bwavyo: aho ikintu cahishwe kiri 'hafi', igishushanyo cisubiramo ku
kirundi.where_it_s_far_the_period_is_longer_yo: ; aho kiri 'kure', igihe kiba kirekire. Ubwonko bwawe busobanura itandukaniro ry'ivyo bihe nk'ubwimbike.
kirundi.1993_94_by_tom_baccei_and_cheri_smith_: (1993–94) vya Tom Baccei na Cheri Smith vyagurishijwe kopi zirenga miriyoni 25 ku isi. Uburyo shingiro bwa autostereogram bwatangijwe na Dr. Christopher Tyler mu 1979.
kirundi.to_see_the_image_hold_your_face_close_: 🧠 Kugira ngo ubone ishusho: egereza mu maso hawe kuri ecran, uruhure amaso nk'aho uraba 'unyuze mu' ishusho werekeza ku rukuta rwa kure, hanyuma usubire inyuma buhoro. Ishusho ya 3D izagaragara. Ibi vyitwa
kirundi.have_difficulty_seeing_stereograms_due: bagorwa no kubona stereogram kubera imiterere nka amblyopia (ijisho ry'umunebwe), strabismus (amaso yerekeranye), canke itandukaniro rindi ryo kuraba n'amaso yombi. Ibi ni ibisanzwe rwose!
kirundi.relax_your_eyes_and_look_through_the_i: Ruhura amaso yawe kandi urabe 'unyuze mu' ishusho kugira ngo ubone 3D
kirundi.hold_your_face_close_to_the_screen: Egereza mu maso hawe kuri ecran
kirundi.relax_your_eyes_try_to_look_through_th: Ruhura amaso yawe — gerageza kuraba 'unyuze mu' ishusho werekeza ku rukuta ruri inyuma yayo
kirundi.slowly_move_back_a_3d_shape_will_emerg: Subira inyuma buhoro. Ishusho ya 3D izagaragara!
kirundi.tip_the_two_guide_dots_above_should_ap: Impanuro: ududomo tubiri tw'ubuyobozi turi hejuru tugomba kugaragara nk'utatu iyo amaso yawe ari mu buryo bukwiye
kirundi.create_animated_3d_stereograms_from_pr: Rema stereogram za 3D zigenda uhereye ku vyagenwe mbere, ku bishushanyo vyawe, ku mashusho wapakiye, ku mpinduka, canke ku makarita y'ubwimbike yatanzwe na AI!
kirundi.draw_a_depth_map_capture_it_as_a_keyfr: Shushanya ikarita y'ubwimbike, uyifate nk'ikadiri y'ingenzi, hanyuma ushushanye iyikurikira. Igenda rizahuza hagati yazo.
kirundi.upload_a_grayscale_image_white_near_bl: Pakira ishusho y'ibara ry'ivu (umweru = hafi, umukara = kure). Izagenzwa hakoreshejwe impinduka watoranyije.
kirundi.animates_the_depth_map_from_the_static: Igenza ikarita y'ubwimbike ivuye ku gafishi Guhagarara ikoresheje ingaruka y'impinduka watoranyije. Banza ujye mu buryo bwa Guhagarara kugira ngo ushushanye ikarita yawe y'ubwimbike.
kirundi.tip_draw_a_depth_map_in_the_static_tab: 💡 Impanuro: Banza ushushanye ikarita y'ubwimbike ku gafishi Guhagarara, hanyuma ugaruke hano uyigenze n'impinduka.
kirundi.describe_a_3d_scene_and_ai_will_genera: Sobanura ahantu ha 3D naho AI izatanga ikarita y'ubwimbike, hanyuma iyigenze n'impinduka.
kirundi.e_g_a_glowing_crystal_orb_floating_in_: urugero Umupira wa kristal urabagirana ureremba mu kirere...
kirundi.generate_ai_depth_map_for_animation: Tanga Ikarita y'Ubwimbike ya AI ku Igenda
kirundi.ai_motion_calls_gemini_to_plan_poses_t: Igenda rya AI rihamagara Gemini kugira ngo ritegure imyanya, hanyuma Imagen ishushanye buri kadiri nk'ikarita yayo bwite y'ubwimbike. Amasegonda 5–7 kuri buri kadiri; ntirirenga imipaka y'ikoreshwa.
kirundi.ai_image_generation_is_not_available_u: ⚠️ Gutanga amashusho hakoreshejwe AI ntibiboneka. Koresha uburyo bw'Igenwe mbere, Shushanya, Pakira, canke Hindura aho kubikora.
kirundi.relax_your_eyes_and_look_through_the_a: Ruhura amaso yawe kandi urabe 'unyuze mu' igenda kugira ngo ubone amashusho ya 3D agenda
kirundi.lock_your_eyes_into_the_3d_view_before: Shyira amaso yawe mu kuraba kwa 3D mbere yo gufyonda Kina
kirundi.slower_speeds_4_6_fps_are_easier_to_ma: Umuvuduko muke (4–6 FPS) woroshye mu kubungabunga ubwitonzi
kirundi.pulse_and_heart_presets_are_the_easies: Ivyagenwe mbere vya Gutera n'Umutima ni vyo vyoroshye kubona bigenda
kirundi.the_exported_gif_can_be_printed_frame_: GIF yasohowe ishobora gucapwa kadiri ku kadiri nk'igitabo co guhindukiza impapuro!
